title: Chocolate Krinkles
ingredients: 2 ounces unsweetened chocolate, melted and slightly cooled
instructions: Cream butter, sugar, and vanilla together.
Beat in eggs, one at a time.
Blend in half of the sifted dry ingredients with half of the milk.
Repeat by blending in the remaining dry ingredients with the remaining milk.
Roll dough into 1 inch balls and roll in powdered sugar.
Place on parchment lined baking sheets.
